title: Sysmon Suspicious Named Pipe Pattern
description: Detects named pipe creation matching common C2 framework patterns including Metasploit, Covenant, and other post-exploitation tools.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Pipe Name' like '\\msf-pipe*' or 'Pipe Name' like '\\meterpreter*')) or (('Pipe Name' like '\\gruntsvc*' or 'Pipe Name' like '\\Covenant*')) or (('Pipe Name' like '*\\evil*' or 'Pipe Name' like '*\\implant*' or 'Pipe Name' like '*\\beacon*' or 'Pipe Name' like '*\\c2pipe*' or 'Pipe Name' like '*\\shell_pipe*' or 'Pipe Name' like '*\\payload*')))
